title: Attachment
description: Represents a file attachment on Confluence content.

id.description: The unique identifier of the attachment.

mediaType.description: The MIME type of the attachment.

mediaTypeDescription.description: Human-readable description of the media type.

comment.description: Comment associated with the attachment upload.

webuiLink.description: The web UI link for viewing the attachment.

downloadLink.description: The download link for the attachment.

pageId.description: The ID of the page this attachment belongs to.

blogPostId.description: The ID of the blog post this attachment belongs to.
